interpretation_note: Exploratory QALY-like burden only: infant mortality is counted as undiscounted life-years lost, acute illness uses symptomatic cases, and hospitalizations are imputed from cases because the model summary has no hospitalization/admission columns. No costs, discounting, age weighting, or formal cost-effectiveness decision rule is applied.
